creator: dbaio@freebsd.org
text:
https://reviews.freebsd.org/D30769

We have now three consecutive timeouts, bugs 255256 255257, and 255258.
All ports can be reset.


If the current maintainer wants to hold them, just answer any PR before the commit.

This is a normal procedure. And we all appreciate his past efforts and hope to see him back in the future.
